name: toulouse_commercial_buildings_near_arterials
description: Toulouse commercial buildings within 50 m of an IGN BD TOPO arterial road (importance 2, 3 or 4 — nationales, départementales, voies principales). Step 1 filters the road network to arterials, step 2 buffers them to 50 m (Lambert93) and intersect-filters the buildings, step 3 keeps those tagged 'Commercial et services' in usage_1 or usage_2.

params.expression: usage_1 == 'Commercial et services' or usage_2 == 'Commercial et services'
